content:
# Core
DOCOMATOR_VERSION=0.1.0-alpha.0
DOCOMATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1
DOCOMATOR_PORT=8080
DOCOMATOR_DATA_DIR=/var/lib/docomator
DOCOMATOR_LOG_LEVEL=info
DOCOMATOR_SESSION_SECRET=CHANGE_ME_DURING_INSTALL

# Worker
DOCOMATOR_WORKER_POLL_MS=1000
DOCOMATOR_WORKER_HEARTBEAT_MS=30000

# Local LLM
DOCOMATOR_LLM_ENABLED=false
DOCOMATOR_LLM_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8081
DOCOMATOR_LLM_MODEL=/var/lib/docomator/models/model.gguf
DOCOMATOR_LLM_HOST=127.0.0.1
DOCOMATOR_LLM_PORT=8081
DOCOMATOR_LLM_CONTEXT=4096
DOCOMATOR_LLM_THREADS=8

# Preview
DOCOMATOR_PREVIEW_ENABLED=true
DOCOMATOR_LIBREOFFICE_BIN=/usr/bin/libreoffice

# Delivery defaults. Secrets should be added only on the target host.
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_ENABLED=false
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_HOST=127.0.0.1
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_PORT=25
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_SECURE=false
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_USER=
DOCOMATOR_SMTP_PASSWORD=

# Collect these packages on a connected reference host with the same OS release.
ca-certificates
fontconfig
fonts-liberation
libreoffice-core
libreoffice-writer
libreoffice-calc
cifs-utils
nfs-common
sqlite3
xz-utils

[Unit]
Description=Docomator API
After=network.target
Wants=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=@DOCOMATOR_USER@
Group=@DOCOMATOR_GROUP@
EnvironmentFile=@DOCOMATOR_CONFIG_DIR@/docomator.env
WorkingDirectory=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/app
ExecStartPre=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/runtime/node/bin/node @DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/app/scripts/runtime/migrate.mjs
ExecStart=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/runtime/node/bin/node @DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/app/apps/api/dist/server.js
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=3
TimeoutStopSec=15
UMask=0027
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true
PrivateDevices=true
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=true
ProtectKernelTunables=true
ProtectKernelModules=true
ProtectControlGroups=true
LockPersonality=true
RestrictRealtime=true
RestrictSUIDSGID=true
ReadWritePaths=@DOCOMATOR_DATA_DIR@

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

[Unit]
Description=Docomator local llama.cpp server
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=@DOCOMATOR_USER@
Group=@DOCOMATOR_GROUP@
EnvironmentFile=@DOCOMATOR_CONFIG_DIR@/docomator.env
WorkingDirectory=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current
ExecStart=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/runtime/llama/llama-server -m ${DOCOMATOR_LLM_MODEL} --host ${DOCOMATOR_LLM_HOST} --port ${DOCOMATOR_LLM_PORT} --ctx-size ${DOCOMATOR_LLM_CONTEXT} --threads ${DOCOMATOR_LLM_THREADS} --parallel 1
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
TimeoutStopSec=30
UMask=0027
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true
PrivateDevices=true
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=true
ProtectKernelTunables=true
ProtectKernelModules=true
ProtectControlGroups=true
LockPersonality=true
RestrictRealtime=true
RestrictSUIDSGID=true
ReadOnlyPaths=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/runtime/llama @DOCOMATOR_DATA_DIR@/models

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

[Unit]
Description=Docomator background worker
After=docomator-api.service
Requires=docomator-api.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=@DOCOMATOR_USER@
Group=@DOCOMATOR_GROUP@
EnvironmentFile=@DOCOMATOR_CONFIG_DIR@/docomator.env
WorkingDirectory=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/app
ExecStart=@DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/runtime/node/bin/node @DOCOMATOR_INSTALL_ROOT@/current/app/apps/worker/dist/main.js
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=3
TimeoutStopSec=30
UMask=0027
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true
PrivateDevices=true
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=true
ProtectKernelTunables=true
ProtectKernelModules=true
ProtectControlGroups=true
LockPersonality=true
RestrictRealtime=true
RestrictSUIDSGID=true
ReadWritePaths=@DOCOMATOR_DATA_DIR@

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
